paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **mBART**, the first multilingual sequence-to-sequence denoising pre-training model trained on a unified corpus of 25 languages. Unlike prior work, it pre-trains a complete encoder-decoder model to reconstruct full texts across multiple languages, enabling direct fine-tuning for any language pair
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl (CC25) corpus (25 languages, ~250K sentences each)
raw_extraction.application: Fine-tuning for supervised/unsupervised machine translation across language pairs, including low-resource scenarios
raw_extraction.research_problem: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) with multilingual generalization
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Sequence-to-sequence denoising auto-encoding (phrase masking + sentence permutation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Explores the effect of pre-training on fewer languages (6 European languages) to evaluate multilinguality impact. Uses the same architecture as mBART25 but with reduced language diversity
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Subset of 6 European languages (Romanian, Italian, Czech, French, German, English) from Common Crawl
raw_extraction.application: Fine-tuning for bilingual translation tasks among the 6 included languages
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating multilingual pre-training effectiveness with controlled language subsets
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Sequence-to-sequence denoising auto-encoding (phrase masking + sentence permutation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Tests bilingual pre-training on English paired with a second language to assess minimal multilingual exposure requirements
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Two bilingual pairs (English + another language) from Common Crawl (e.g., English-Russian, English-German)
raw_extraction.application: Fine-tuning for bilingual translation between the two languages in the corpus
raw_extraction.research_problem: Assessing minimal multilingual pre-training requirements for translation tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Sequence-to-sequence denoising auto-encoding (phrase masking + sentence permutation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Monolingual baseline model trained only on English data for direct comparison against mBART’s multilingual approach
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: English-only monolingual corpus (same as mBART training corpus subset)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Establishing performance baselines for multilingual vs monolingual pre-training
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Standard BART causal language modeling (next-token prediction)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced a multilingual denoising pre-training framework (mBART) that leverages noisy input sequences to improve generalization across languages, achieving state-of-the-art results on low-resource language pairs
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Monolingual English (79M sentences) and multilingual corpus including Myanma (29M sentences) based on CC100 and Common Crawl subsets
raw_extraction.application: Low-resource language pair translation, crosslingual transfer learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Multilingual neural machine translation with limited bilingual data
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Extended mBART02 with more languages (Romanian, Dutch) and larger model capacity to improve crosslingual transfer capabilities, particularly for European languages
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Expanded multilingual corpus including Romanian (Ro) and Dutch (Nl) segments
raw_extraction.application: Crosslingual translation, low-resource language support, document-level translation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling multilingual machine translation with increased language diversity
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
